name: Redbrand
description_short: Member-owned credit union serving Peoria and Tazewell Counties with vehicle loans, personal loans, home equity financing, and VISA credit cards.
description_long:
Redbrand Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution serving hardworking families in Peoria and Tazewell Counties. The organization is currently undergoing a merger with R.I.A. Federal Credit Union to form a stronger, more resilient institution with expanded resources and services for members. As a federally insured credit union, Redbrand operates under NCUA insurance protections and focuses on personalized member service with local community ties. The organization emphasizes accessibility and member education as core values.

Redbrand offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including vehicle loans (new and used auto financing and refinancing), personal signature loans, home equity loans, recreational vehicle loans, and VISA credit card programs. They provide loan deferral options through their Skip-A-Pay program, allowing up to one payment deferral per year (maximum six over the life of the loan). The credit union also offers youth savings accounts (Safari accounts) designed to encourage financial habits in younger members. Auto refinancing tools are available on their website for rate comparison, and they maintain an ATM locator service for member convenience.

Redbrand distinguishes itself through competitive introductory rates (new vehicles from 4.00% APR, used vehicles from 4.25% APR, personal loans from 7.00% APR) and emphasis on member-centric service. Testimonials highlight the credit union's willingness to work with members facing credit challenges and proactive loan refinancing recommendations that have generated significant savings (one member reported over $10,000 in savings). The organization emphasizes personalized service, with members noting staff willingness to "go above and beyond." Their largest auto inventory browsing tool and pre-approval process cater specifically to vehicle borrowers.

As a credit union, Redbrand offers the mutual structure and typically lower rates characteristic of member-owned institutions, but membership eligibility may be restricted to those in their service area (Peoria and Tazewell Counties). The pending merger with R.I.A. Federal Credit Union introduces transition uncertainty regarding service continuity and potential changes to product offerings or rates. Limited information is publicly available regarding savings account terms, CD rates, or comprehensive fee structures beyond loan products.
services: New vehicle loans (4.00% APR introductory rate)
Used vehicle loans (4.25% APR introductory rate)
Auto refinancing with online calculation tool
Personal signature loans (7.00% APR introductory rate)
Recreational vehicle loans (4.00% APR introductory rate)
Home equity loans for debt consolidation and home improvement
VISA credit card programs with multiple card options
Skip-A-Pay loan deferral program (payment deferrals on qualifying loans)
Youth savings accounts (Safari accounts with deposit rewards)
Auto inventory browsing and pre-approval tool
pros: Competitive vehicle loan rates starting at 4.00% APR for new cars and 4.25% for used vehicles
Skip-A-Pay loan deferral program allowing one payment skip per year for qualifying loans (up to 6 lifetime deferrals)
Member testimonials document significant refinance savings (one member reported $10,000+ in savings and one year off loan term)
Willingness to work with members with poor credit history, as evidenced by customer reviews
VISA credit card program recently launched with multiple card options for members
Home equity loans available with stated focus on competitive rates and flexible use (debt consolidation, home improvement, emergency expenses)
Youth savings accounts (Safari accounts) with deposit rewards to encourage family financial literacy
cons: Membership restricted to hardworking families of Pe867 and Tazewell Counties only—geographic service area limitation
Skip-A-Pay program unavailable on home equity loans and credit cards, limiting flexibility for these products
Pending merger with R.I.A. Federal Credit Union creates uncertainty around service continuity, potential rate changes, and product modifications
Limited publicly available information on savings account APYs, CD rates, monthly fees, and full fee structure
No information provided regarding online banking capabilities, mobile app features, or full digital service offerings
best_for: Vehicle buyers and refinancers in Peoria and Tazewell Counties seeking competitive auto loan rates
Members with fair or rebuilding credit seeking personalized service and flexible lending
Families prioritizing member-owned financial institutions with local community focus and personal service relationships
Borrowers interested in loan payment flexibility through skip-a-pay programs on auto and personal loans
diagnosis: Redbrand Credit Union is best for borrowers in Peoria and Tazewell Counties seeking competitive vehicle financing and personalized service from a member-owned institution with demonstrated willingness to help credit-challenged applicants. The primary caveat is geographic restriction to their service area and the pending merger with R.I.A. Federal Credit Union, which creates uncertainty regarding future rates, products, and service availability.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
